tasks.label: Run ALU
tasks.command: vsim -do "vlib work; vcom src/alu_32.vhd; vcom testbench/tb_alu_32.vhd; vsim work.tb_alu_32; add wave *; run 200 ns"

tasks.label: Run Data Memory
tasks.command: vsim -do "vlib work; vcom src/data_memory_32.vhd; vcom testbench/tb_data_memory_32.vhd; vsim work.tb_data_memory_32; add wave *; run 100 ns"

tasks.label: Run Registers File
tasks.command: vsim -do "vlib work; vcom src/register_file_32.vhd; vcom testbench/tb_register_file_32.vhd; vsim work.tb_register_file_32; add wave *; run 200 ns"

tasks.label: Run Instruction Memory
tasks.command: vsim -do "vlib work; vcom src/instruction_memory_32.vhd; vcom testbench/tb_instruction_memory_32.vhd; vsim work.tb_instruction_memory_32; add wave *; run 100 ns"

tasks.label: Run ALU Control
tasks.command: vsim -do "vlib work; vcom src/alu_control_32.vhd; vcom testbench/tb_alu_control_32.vhd; vsim work.tb_alu_control_32; add wave *; run 200 ns"

tasks.label: Run Control Unit
tasks.command: vsim -do "vlib work; vcom src/control_unit_32.vhd; vcom testbench/tb_control_unit_32.vhd; vsim work.tb_control_unit_32; add wave *; run 200 ns"
